title: Shipping & delivery times
body: Standard shipping in the US takes 3-5 business days. Express shipping is 1-2 business days. International orders typically arrive in 7-14 business days depending on destination.

title: Return policy
body: You may return any unopened item within 30 days of delivery for a full refund. Opened items in like-new condition may be returned within 14 days for store credit. Final-sale items are not eligible for return.

title: Standard warranty coverage
body: All NeonCart-sold products carry a 1-year limited warranty against manufacturing defects. Premium electronics (laptops, monitors) carry a 2-year warranty. Extended warranties can be purchased at checkout.

title: How to track your order
body: Once your order ships you will receive a tracking number via email. You can also view tracking on your account page under 'My Orders'. Tracking typically updates within 24 hours of dispatch.

title: Account recovery & password reset
body: To reset your password, click 'Forgot Password' on the sign-in page. You will receive a reset link via email. The link expires in 60 minutes for security. For account access issues contact support.

title: Accepted payment methods
body: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal, and store gift cards. Buy-now-pay-later via Affirm is available on orders over $100.

title: Gift cards
body: NeonCart gift cards come in $25, $50, $100, $250, and $500 denominations. They never expire and can be combined with promotional codes. Physical gift cards ship free.

title: International shipping
body: We ship to over 30 countries. International orders may be subject to customs duties and taxes payable on delivery. Free international shipping is available on orders over $200.

title: Cancelling an order
body: You can cancel an order from your account page within 1 hour of placing it. After that, the order enters fulfillment and cannot be cancelled — you can instead request a return after delivery.

title: Using promotion codes
body: Promotion codes can be entered at checkout. Only one promotion code can be used per order. Promotion codes cannot be combined with employee discounts or price-match.

title: Employee discount program
body: NeonCart employees receive 40% off most items using the EMPLOYEE40 code. Some product categories (specifically gift cards and limited-edition items) are excluded from employee discounts.

title: Price match guarantee
body: We will match prices from authorized resellers within 14 days of purchase. Submit a price-match request through your account page with a link to the competitor listing.

title: Bulk and corporate orders
body: For orders of 10 or more identical items, contact our business sales team at sales@neoncart.local for volume pricing. Tax-exempt purchases require documentation on file.

title: Data privacy & GDPR
body: We do not sell your personal data. EU residents may request a data export or deletion under GDPR. Submit requests via the privacy portal on your account page.

title: NeonCart Rewards loyalty program
body: Earn 1 point per dollar spent. 100 points equals $1 in rewards. Members at Silver tier get free express shipping; Gold tier members get 5% off every order.

title: Reporting a defective item
body: If your item arrived defective or damaged, please contact support within 7 days with photos. We will arrange a free replacement or full refund.

title: Domestic shipping rates
body: Standard ground shipping is free on orders over $50, otherwise $5.99 flat. Express 2-day shipping is $14.99. Overnight shipping is $24.99 and orders must be placed by 2pm local time.

title: Sizing & compatibility
body: For accessories and cases, see our compatibility guide on each product page. For wearables, our universal sizing chart is linked from the product details.

title: Recycling and trade-in program
body: Trade in any old electronics for store credit toward your next purchase. We responsibly recycle items at certified e-waste partners. See the trade-in portal for current values.

title: Contacting support
body: Reach our support team via the chat widget on any page, by email at support@neoncart.local, or by phone at 1-800-NEON-CART. Live chat is available 24/7 in English.
